chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1700 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.8639/023 3. For hearing of main case 19.12.2024 Mr. Abdul Qadir Syed advocate for the petitioner Mr. Asad Ali Khan Shirwany, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Present petition impugns demand issued by the Customs Collectorate Appraisement West dated 09.01.2020 and apparently reiterated on 16.02.2022. Irrespective of the maintainability whether the petition could be filed to assail the same learned counsel was confronted as to laches since petition appears to have filed in March 2023, learned counsel remained unable to assist. Petition is found to be misconceived hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
